recommendations.title: Minnal Murali
recommendations.overview: A tailor gains special powers after being struck by lightning but must take down an unexpected foe if he is to become the superhero his hometown in Kerala needs.

recommendations.title: The Teacher
recommendations.overview: The principal of an elementary school calls a special parents meeting after it’s alleged that the seemingly empathetic and kindly-looking teacher Mrs. Drazděchová uses her students to manipulate their parents.

recommendations.title: Like Mike
recommendations.overview: Calvin and his friends, who all live in an orphanage, find old shoes with the faded letters MJ connected to a powerline. One stormy night, they go to get the shoes when Calvin and the shoes are struck by lightning. Calvin now has unbelievable basketb

recommendations.title: Struck by Lightning
recommendations.overview: After being struck and killed by lightning, a young man recounts the way he blackmailed his fellow classmates into contributing to his literary magazine.

recommendations.title: About Fate
recommendations.overview: Two strangers believe in love but never seem to be able to find its true meaning. In a wild twist of events, fate puts each in the other's path on one stormy New Year's Eve.

recommendations.title: Skhizein
recommendations.overview: Having been struck by a 150-ton meteorite, Henry has to adapt to living precisely ninety-one centimeters from himself.

recommendations.title: Tenor
recommendations.overview: While working part-time as a food deliveryman, Antoine, an aspiring young rapper from the suburbs of Paris, meets Mrs. Loiseau, an eminent teacher at the Paris Opéra. Stunned by the young man's raw talent, she introduces him to the world of opera. As

recommendations.title: Youth Without Youth
recommendations.overview: Professor of language and philosophy Dominic Matei is struck by lightning and  ages backwards from 70 to 40 in a week, attracting the world and the Nazis. While on the run, the professor meets a young woman who has her own experience with a lightning

recommendations.title: Teaching Mrs. Tingle
recommendations.overview: A bright high-school senior has her impending status as valedictorian jeopardized when her bitter history teacher, Mrs. Tingle, gives her a poor grade on a project.  When an attempt to get ahead in Mrs. Tingle's class goes awry, mayhem ensues and fri

recommendations.title: Before I Fall
recommendations.overview: Samantha Kingston has everything. Then, everything changes. After one fateful night, she wakes up with no future at all. Trapped into reliving the same day over and over, she begins to question just how perfect her life really was.
